header.title: Community Notices
header.description: Review the latest resident updates, operational changes, and any action required from your unit.

items.title: Emergency Water Main Repair
items.description: Notice of immediate water service disruption affecting North Wing residents due to a critical main break.
items.affectedArea: Blocks A, B, and C (North Wing)
summaryParagraphs: At approximately 8:45 AM today, site security identified a significant leak near the North Entryway Gate. Engineering teams have confirmed a primary water main rupture. To facilitate emergency repairs, water service has been temporarily suspended for the following blocks:
highlightedAreaItems: Blocks A, B, and C (North Wing)
timelineParagraphs: Our technicians are currently on-site excavating the affected section. We estimate repairs will be completed by 4:00 PM today, October 24th. Please note that when service is restored, you may experience temporary air in the pipes or slight discoloration. We recommend running your cold water taps for 2 minutes once service returns.
items.supportDescription: Our management team is available 24/7 to assist with any concerns regarding this outage.

items.title: Elevator Modernization
items.description: Service improvements are starting next week to upgrade the South Wing lifts with smarter controls and faster response times.
items.schedule: Works scheduled from Oct 28 to Nov 12
summaryParagraphs: The South Wing modernization project will upgrade control systems, cabin interiors, and safety communications. Lift operations will continue in phases so residents maintain access throughout the work period.
highlightedAreaItems: Level G and Podium transfer lobby
timelineParagraphs: Contractors will rotate one lift offline at a time to minimize disruption. Peak-hour wait times may increase, especially between 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM and 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM. Signage and temporary queue markers will be installed during each phase.
items.supportDescription: Contact the concierge if you need lift reservations for movers, deliveries, or assisted resident access.
